description:
Advances: mutagen.scope_resolution

Deliverable: migrate .spec/specs/scope_resolution.spec.md to the SpecLedEx schema:
- spec-scenarios block: reshape each scenario to given:/when:/then: arrays (bespoke shape fails parse with 'expected array').
- spec-verification block: replace execute:/source_file: stubs with command: and target: entries; every requirement gets a verification entry.
- spec-meta: flip status: draft -> active once the file validates.
- keep prose, intent, id, surface, and decisions links intact.

Verification:
- mix spec.validate emits ZERO errors for mutagen.scope_resolution (baseline: 6 errors on this file).
- subject status is active in .spec/state.json.

Out of Scope (files): every .spec.md EXCEPT scope_resolution.spec.md; lib/**; test/**.
Allowed touches: .spec/specs/scope_resolution.spec.md only.
Out of Scope (intent): no realized_by bindings (phase2); no code/test edits; do not alter requirement ids or delete requirements.
Merge gate: mix spec.validate (0 errors for mutagen.scope_resolution) && mix compile --warnings-as-errors && mix test

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED

Migrated .spec/specs/scope_resolution.spec.md to the SpecLedEx schema.

Changes:
- spec-scenarios (s1-s9): reshaped given:/when:/then: scalars into YAML arrays (fixes 'expected array' parse_error).
- spec-verification (v1-v5): converted command:/execute: stubs to kind: command + target: entries.
- Added v6 (covers r6) and v7 (covers r7) so every requirement has a verification entry (cleared the requirement_without_verification warnings).
- spec-meta: status draft -> active.
- Kept prose, intent, id, surface, decisions links, and all requirement ids/statements intact. No realized_by bindings (phase2).

Merge gate (local):
- mix spec.validate -> ZERO errors AND zero warnings for mutagen.scope_resolution (baseline was 6 errors). Other unmigrated subjects (e.g. test_selection) still show errors, as expected this phase.
- subject status is 'active' in .spec/state.json (regenerated by the mix task and committed alongside the spec edit).
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors -> clean.
- mix test -> 640 tests, 0 failures (19 excluded).

Allowed touches respected: only .spec/specs/scope_resolution.spec.md + generated .spec/state.json. No lib/**, test/**, or other spec edits.

Commit: 0e6ea95

title: migrate mutagen.scope_resolution to SpecLedEx schema (6 errors)
